modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Receiving pop-ups about Data Policy Tips in Office applications.

full_description_text:  
I was just using Word and Excel, you know, doing my work, and then these pop-ups started showing up. They keep cautioning me about sharing sensitive data, which is really annoying. I mean, what are these Data Policy Tips anyway? I just want to know what to do about these pop-ups because they keep interrupting my work.
